subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, my God! I beseech Thee by Him Who hath accepted tribulations in Thy path and summoned all unto Thy most exalted horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بالذی قبل البلایا فی سبیلک و دعا الکل الی افقک الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
